articles.title: 10 stocks crash up to 50% in just 100 days of US-Iran war. Do you own any?
articles.excerpt: The Indian stock market has seen a sharp drop since the war between Iran and the US-Israel began late in February, wiping off massive sums of investor wealth on Dalal Street. Nifty 50 declined more than 7% during the period, despite hopes of a peace agreement…
articles.content: The Indian stock market has seen a sharp drop since the war between Iran and the US-Israel began late in February, wiping off massive sums of investor wealth on Dalal Street. Nifty 50 declined more than 7% during the period, despite hopes of a peace agreement…
articles.author: Agencies

articles.title: Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan claims victory following general election
articles.excerpt: Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan has claimed victory in the country’s Sunday general election, as preliminary results showed his governing Civil Contract party came first with 49.81% of the vote
articles.content: Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan has claimed victory in the country’s Sunday general election, as preliminary results showed his governing Civil Contract party came first with 49.81% of the vote
articles.author: The Associated Press

articles.title: Supreme Court: Court appointed amicus curiae seeks direction to MCD on action taken against illegal constructions
articles.excerpt: A court-appointed amicus curiae has approached the Supreme Court for urgent intervention. This follows a building collapse in Saidulajab, Delhi, which claimed lives. The amicus seeks directions for the Municipal Corporation of Delhi to survey and act against …
